videos.title: HTML Video Tag Tutorial - All Attributes Explained
videos.description: Learn everything about the HTML video tag including attributes, source elements, tracks, and JavaScript control.

videos.title: Build a Custom HTML5 Video Player
videos.description: Step-by-step tutorial to build a completely custom HTML5 video player with CSS styling and JavaScript controls.

videos.title: JavaScript Video and Audio API
videos.description: Comprehensive guide to the JavaScript Video API covering playback control, events, and integration with the Fullscreen API.

videos.title: Picture-in-Picture API Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to implement Picture-in-Picture mode for video elements with JavaScript.

videos.title: HTML5 Video and Audio Deep Dive
videos.description: Deep dive into HTML5 media elements including video formats, codecs, Media Source Extensions, and advanced playback techniques.

videos.title: Creating a YouTube Clone with HTML Video
videos.description: Build a YouTube-like video player interface with custom controls, playlist, and responsive design.

videos.title: CSS and Video: Responsive Video Embeds
videos.description: Kevin Powell demonstrates techniques for making video players responsive with CSS, including aspect ratio boxes and object-fit.
